title: Dynamic Motion
description: Client side mod that adds dynamic motion to horses, minecarts, elytras, and more.
body:
# DYNAMO!

> Dynamic Motion for Minecraft movement and transportation. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8TVR9lcTAqI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Dependencies

1. This mod was developed with express support for [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). The mod does work without it, however some of the animations may be jarring without customization. I recommend SUBTLE or DEFAULT animation presets.

2. **View Bobbing**. This mod uses a fork of the View Bobbing system to inject animations, so having View Bobbing disabled will only support some FOV effects.

## Supported Features

Supports _nearly_ all forms of transportation. The primrary supported mobs/methods are as follows:
- **Elytra**
- **Walking**
- **Horse/Mule/Donkey**
- **Minecart**
- **Swimming and Boating**
- _Whatever else I forgot..._

### Unsupported features?
> This mod should work with _unrecognized mounts,_ which means other mods or defaults if the grab code doesn't work properly. If this causes issues make sure to report the bug in the discord so I can fix it!
